mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER (USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{displayName}, #{roleCode}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME FROM TB_USER ORDER BY USER_ID
SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME FROM TB_USER WHERE ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode}
SELECT USER_ID, USERNAME, PASSWORD, DISPLAY_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, LAST_LOGIN_TIME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME FROM TB_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{id} LIMIT 1
